title: Tweetos
description: Are you an Insane Wackjob with No Friends?? well boy do I have a fix.. Craft them!! with tweetos adding like flying Golem boys.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/762a7540fada6961f3e974b06fc0f367347b353d.png)

## Tweetos adds 1 simple thing, tweetos!! small copper fellas that fly! :D

### **more to be added!!**
make sure to suppourt me ok Ko-fi if you like the Mod and Want More!
